_note: Covers Axum's core routing and middleware system. Router is the central struct; Router.route registers paths; Router.layer attaches tower middleware; MethodRouter holds per-method handlers (returned by get/post/put helpers); Handler is the trait async functions implement; Router.nest enables sub-router composition; from_fn and Next provide inline async middleware; FromRequestParts is the extractor trait for pulling typed data from requests; Router.fallback handles unmatched routes. Verified by grep in axum/src/ at 9f4d52e.
